scriptLines: entry as (fullUrl as string, resource as (resourceType as string, id as string, meta as (profile as string[]), text as (status as string, div as string), extension as (url as string, extension as (url as string, valueCoding as (system as string, code as string, display as string))[])[], identifier as (system as string, value as string)[], name as (use as string, family as string, given as string[], prefix as string[])[], telecom as (system as string, value as string, use as string)[], gender as string, birthDate as string, address as (extension as (url as string, extension as (url as string, valueDecimal as double)[])[], line as string[], city as string, state as string, postalCode as string, country as string)[], maritalStatus as (coding as (system as string, code as string, display as string)[], text as string), multipleBirthBoolean as boolean, communication as (language as (coding as (system as string, code as string, display as string)[], text as string))[]), request as (method as string, url as string))[]

aggregate1 derive(insurance_tier = case(     in(['Humana', 'UnitedHealthcare', 'Aetna'], insurance_cover_display), 'Premium',     in(['Medicare', 'Medicaid'], insurance_cover_display), 'Government',     isNull(insurance_cover_display), 'Unknown',     'Standard' )) ~> derivedColumn2
